testsuite.name: RESEARCHMANTRA_AUTOMATION.AUTOMATION.Login_Screen_Tests

testcase.name: testLoginScreenFlow
testcase.system-out: -> Starting Comprehensive Login Suite for: 7661936911 -> No permission popup detected. -> Executing Negative Test: Empty Mobile Number -> Verified Toast Message: Please enter valid mobile number -> Executing Negative Test: Invalid Mobile Number (12345) -> Verified Toast Message: Please enter valid mobile number -> Executing Positive Test: Valid Mobile Number -> Waiting for transition to OTP screen... -> Successfully arrived at OTP Verification Screen. -> Validating OTP Screen UI Elements... -> Change Number and Resend Code buttons are visible. -> Executing Negative Test: Invalid OTP -> Intercepting valid OTP via API... -> Retrieved OTP: 787078 -> Entering Valid OTP... -> Detecting landing screen... -> New User detected. Executing Registration Flow... -> Entering Data: vamshi krishna | vamshikrishna11@test.com | Delhi -> Scrolling to reveal Registration options... -> Testing Gender Radio Buttons... -> Successfully toggled Gender selection to Female. -> Submitting Registration Form... -> ✅ Login Flow Complete! Logged in as: vamshi krishna

testsuite.system-out:
⏳ APPIUM IS CLEANING DEVICE AND INSTALLING FRESH APK... ✅ APPIUM SESSION ESTABLISHED - STABILITY MODE ENGAGED!
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testLoginScreenFlow ======================================================== -> Starting Comprehensive Login Suite for: 7661936911 -> No permission popup detected. -> Executing Negative Test: Empty Mobile Number -> Verified Toast Message: Please enter valid mobile number -> Executing Negative Test: Invalid Mobile Number (12345) -> Verified Toast Message: Please enter valid mobile number -> Executing Positive Test: Valid Mobile Number -> Waiting for transition to OTP screen... -> Successfully arrived at OTP Verification Screen. -> Validating OTP Screen UI Elements... -> Change Number and Resend Code buttons are visible. -> Executing Negative Test: Invalid OTP -> Intercepting valid OTP via API... -> Retrieved OTP: 787078 -> Entering Valid OTP... -> Detecting landing screen... -> New User detected. Executing Registration Flow... -> Entering Data: vamshi krishna | vamshikrishna11@test.com | Delhi -> Scrolling to reveal Registration options... -> Testing Gender Radio Buttons... -> Successfully toggled Gender selection to Female. -> Submitting Registration Form... -> ✅ Login Flow Complete! Logged in as: vamshi krishna -> ✅ Test Case Passed: testLoginScreenFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 156.611 SECONDS.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testDashboardCompleteFlow ======================================================== -> Starting Comprehensive Dashboard Verification... -> Step 1: Checking User Profile Name in Header. -> Profile Name verified in header: vamshi krishna -> Step 2: Checking Notification Bell & Tabs. -> Clicked Notification Bell successfully. -> Successfully interacted with all Notification tabs. -> Returned to Dashboard from Notifications. -> Step 3: Deep Clicking Core Trade Category Cards. -> Testing Routing for: MCX Positional -> ✅ Successfully routed to Product Screen for: MCX Positional -> Testing Routing for: Long term Goal Oriented -> ✅ Successfully routed to Product Screen for: Long term Goal Oriented -> Testing Routing for: Nifty Positional -> ✅ Successfully routed to Product Screen for: Nifty Positional -> Testing Routing for: Midcap Positional -> ✅ Successfully routed to Product Screen for: Midcap Positional -> Step 4: Deep Clicking Promotional Banners. -> Routing check for Research Reports timed out. -> Step 5: Testing Bottom Navigation Functional Clicks. -> Clicking Bottom Nav Tab: Trades -> Navigated to 'Trades' tab successfully. -> Clicking Bottom Nav Tab: Blogs -> Navigated to 'Blogs' tab successfully. -> Clicking Bottom Nav Tab: Tools -> Navigated to 'Tools' tab successfully. -> Clicking Bottom Nav Tab: Profile -> Navigated to 'Profile' tab successfully. -> Clicking Bottom Nav Tab: Explore -> Navigated to 'Explore' tab successfully. -> ✅ Master Dashboard Top-to-Bottom Flow completed successfully. -> ✅ Test Case Passed: testDashboardCompleteFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 37.708 SECONDS.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testAllProductsPaymentGatewayFlow ======================================================== -> Step 1: Navigating to Trades -> Home Tab. -> Step 2: Processing Product Cards sequentially... -> =============================================== -> 🧪 TESTING BUSINESS FLOW FOR: MCX Positional -> Testing Heart/Like Toggle... -> Heart icon not found for this card. -> Clicking Product Card to open details... -> Could not route into card. Skipping to next. -> =============================================== -> 🧪 TESTING BUSINESS FLOW FOR: Nifty Positional -> Testing Heart/Like Toggle... -> Heart icon not found for this card. -> Clicking Product Card to open details... -> Could not route into card. Skipping to next. -> =============================================== -> 🧪 TESTING BUSINESS FLOW FOR: Midcap Positional -> Testing Heart/Like Toggle... -> Heart icon not found for this card. -> Clicking Product Card to open details... -> Could not route into card. Skipping to next. -> =============================================== -> 🧪 TESTING BUSINESS FLOW FOR: Long term Goal Oriented -> Testing Heart/Like Toggle... -> Heart icon not found for this card. -> Clicking Product Card to open details... -> Could not route into card. Skipping to next. -> =============================================== -> Step 3: Verifying Ledger in 'My Collection' -> No new products purchased. Skipping Collection verification. -> ✅ Test Case Passed: testAllProductsPaymentGatewayFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 236.57 SECONDS.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testDynamicTradesScreenFlow ======================================================== -> Starting Dynamic Trades Screen Verification. -> Navigating to Trades Bottom Tab. -> Step 1: Extracting dynamic product list from the app... -> Dynamically found 3 products: [Nifty Positional, Midcap Positional, Long term Goal Oriented] -> =============================================== -> 🧪 TESTING PRODUCT: Nifty Positional -> -> Checking Home Tab for: Nifty Positional -> Found Home Service Card for: Nifty Positional -> -> Checking Live Trades Tab for: Nifty Positional -> -> Verifying 'Details' Sub-Tab (Subscription Logic). -> 🔒 Product [Nifty Positional] is NOT PURCHASED. 'Activate Now' lock screen is correctly displayed. -> -> Verifying 'Live Commentary' Sub-Tab (Free Access). -> ✅ Live Commentary feed loaded with free access data. -> -> Checking Closed Trades Tab for: Nifty Positional (Free Access) -> ✅ Closed Trades (Booked Trades) loaded with free access data. -> ✅ Full verification complete for: Nifty Positional -> =============================================== -> 🧪 TESTING PRODUCT: Midcap Positional -> -> Checking Home Tab for: Midcap Positional -> Found Home Service Card for: Midcap Positional -> -> Checking Live Trades Tab for: Midcap Positional -> -> Verifying 'Details' Sub-Tab (Subscription Logic). -> 🔒 Product [Midcap Positional] is NOT PURCHASED. 'Activate Now' lock screen is correctly displayed. -> -> Verifying 'Live Commentary' Sub-Tab (Free Access). -> ✅ Live Commentary feed loaded with free access data. -> -> Checking Closed Trades Tab for: Midcap Positional (Free Access) -> Closed Trades UI had issues rendering. -> ❌ Test Case Failed: testDynamicTradesScreenFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 95.651 SECONDS.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testLiveSignalRoutingAndNotifications ======================================================== -> Verifying Signal Distribution Logic. -> Opening the first available product to check for Live Commentary... -> ❌ Test Case Failed: testLiveSignalRoutingAndNotifications -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 63.168 SECONDS.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testBlogsScreenFlow ======================================================== -> Starting Blogs Screen Verification. -> Navigating to Blogs Tab. -> Step 1: Verifying Blog Card Content. -> Could not find any Blog posts in the feed. -> ❌ Test Case Failed: testBlogsScreenFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 15.79 SECONDS.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testToolsScreenFlow ======================================================== -> Starting Tools Screen Verification. -> Navigating to Tools Tab. -> Tools Screen Test Failed: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element located by: By.xpath: //*[contains(@content-desc, 'Retirement Plans')] (tried for 12 second(s) with 100 milliseconds interval) -> ❌ Test Case Failed: testToolsScreenFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 15.833 SECONDS.
======================================================== 🚀 STARTING TEST: testProfileAndSettingsFlow ======================================================== -> Starting Profile & Settings Verification. -> Step 1: Navigating to Profile Tab. -> Profile Main Landing UI loaded. -> Step 2: Testing Personal Details Update logic. -> Profile & Settings Flow Failed: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element located by: AppiumBy.accessibilityId: Update (tried for 12 second(s) with 100 milliseconds interval) -> ❌ Test Case Failed: testProfileAndSettingsFlow -> ⏱️ SCREEN COMPLETED IN: 16.037 SECONDS.
